title: Intensely Creamy Russian Chicken Bake
description: A peppery and creamy Russian dish featuring oat milk, perfect for a crowd, this high-protein-friendly bake is sure to please. It combines tender chicken with a rich and satisfying sauce.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together oat milk, Greek yogurt, Dijon mustard, black pepper, paprika, garlic powder, and salt.
Add the chicken to the bowl and mix until the pieces are well coated with the sauce.
Transfer the chicken mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Sprinkle the shredded cheddar cheese evenly over the top of the chicken.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through and the cheese is melted and golden brown.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley or dill if desired.
